servicesSection.title: Services tailored for real estate
servicesSection.description: Clear deliverables, strong turnaround expectations, and media designed to help listings move faster.

portfolioSection.title: Featured portfolio
portfolioSection.description: A curated preview of interiors, exteriors, drone work, and listing visuals.

testimonialsSection.title: Confidence without over-selling
testimonialsSection.description: The site should read like a serious local business with strong service standards, not a generic template.

credentialsSection.title: Precision, professionalism, and trust
credentialsSection.description: The Base44 direction leaned heavily on credibility. These blocks keep that trust layer explicit.

cta.title: Bring the booking flow and the property details into one clear process.
cta.description: The v1 site keeps the intake simple: strong portfolio, clear pricing, one booking path, and owner-editable content.

hero.heading: Browse the collection of real estate photography, drone imagery, and video work.
hero.description: This mirrors the Base44 structure: simple filters, clean cards, and a curated feel rather than a dump of every file.

cta.title: If the work is the sell, the next step should be obvious.
cta.description: Keep the portfolio page lean, then drive people into the booking page without making them hunt.

hero.heading: Professional real estate media with clear deliverables and pricing.
hero.description: The Base44 direction showed public pricing and strong service detail. This scaffold follows that rather than hiding everything behind a contact wall.

overview.title: Service overview
overview.description: Use these cards as the preview layer. The detail blocks below carry the actual decision-making information.

cta.title: Bundle the right mix of photo, drone, and walkthrough coverage.
cta.description: Keep the public pricing clear, but leave room for tailored requests when the listing needs something outside the standard packages.

hero.heading: Precision, professionalism, and local trust.
hero.description: This page carries the serious local operator tone from the Base44 concept and keeps the trust stack explicit.

credentialsSection.title: Trust should be visible, not implied.
credentialsSection.description: The Base44 concept made credentials a real section. That is the right move for this category.

cta.title: Serving Beaufort, Bluffton, Hilton Head, and the Lowcountry
cta.description: The final copy and service radius can change through the CMS, but the page should always make geography and professionalism obvious.

hero.heading: Schedule your shoot.
hero.description: Business contact details, property intake, and scheduling stay together so the booking path is obvious.

bookingFlowCard.title: One page, one process.
bookingFlowCard.description: Collect the property details first, then let the client reserve a time through Calendly. That keeps the workflow unified even before deeper automation is added.
